title: General Dynamics (GD)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on General Dynamics. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what GD is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale: ">General Dynamics possesses a robust order backlog across Aerospace (Gulfstream) and Marine Systems (submarine production). 8% FCF growth models stable execution on existing long-term contracts and modest margin expansion.

discountRate.rationale: ">General Dynamics possesses a robust order backlog across Aerospace (Gulfstream) and Marine Systems (submarine production). 8% FCF growth models stable execution on existing long-term contracts and modest margin expansion.

terminalGrowth.rationale: ">General Dynamics possesses a robust order backlog across Aerospace (Gulfstream) and Marine Systems (submarine production). 8% FCF growth models stable execution on existing long-term contracts and modest margin expansion.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
